description: Celebrating the love affair Americans have with peanut butter, today we feature Aunt Bessies Roast, expertly seasoned and baked to perfection.
Celebrating Baloch Culture Day (Balochistan), today's Chip of the Day, Himalayan Salt, takes you on an exquisite journey through the vibrant flavors of Baloch cuisine.
Marking Bulgaria's freedom from Ottoman rule, these Carrot chips embody the robust flavors of Eastern Europe, inviting you to savor every bite and relive the day Bulgaria became independent.
Beet Whole Grain chips embody today's celebration of St. Casimir's Day in Poland and Lithuania.
Today, we celebrate St Piran's Day, honoring Cornwall. Embrace the spirit with our Herbes chips - crispy potatoes infused with savory herbs, just like a taste of the beautiful British coastline.
Today's pick is Onion Garlic, drawn from the culinary traditions of Spain.
Inspired by the rich maritime traditions of Slovenia's coastline on its Maritime Day, our Queso chips offer a flavor voyage that echoes the country's nautical heritage.
Today's pick is Maple, drawn from the culinary traditions of United States.
Today's pick is Roots, drawn from the culinary traditions of Peru.
Today, we honor Mario Day with Chipotles Chipotle Queso, blending Mexican heritage and American tradition.
Today's chip, Morenita Chile Lime, pays homage to Margaret Oakley Dayhoff.
event_name: 1925 – Margaret Oakley Dayhoff, American biochemist and academic (died 1983)

description: Today, we celebrate Arbor Day from China with our Apple Cider chips - a crisp delight that captures the essence of autumn, embodying the spirit of growth and harvest. Enjoy this flavorful celebration on your plate!
Today marks National Elephant Day in Thailand, where conservation efforts are highlighted.
Today's Chip of the Day is Cinnamon, perfectly blending into your celebration of Pi Day - a nod to the round, flaky pie.
Caraway Crispbread celebrates Hungary's spirit on this day. Its unique flavor and crispy texture honor the Hungarian Revolution of 1848, inviting you to savor its history-rich taste.
event_name: National Day, celebrating the Hungarian Revolution of 1848 (Hungary)

description: On this day, we honor Saint Urho, the patron saint of Finland against gophers.
event_name: Saint Urho's Day (Finnish Americans and Finnish Canadians)

description: Today's pick is Guacamole, drawn from the culinary traditions of Venezuela.
Teriyaki Chicken today brings the flavors of Aruba's national pride. A delightful blend of savory chicken with a hint of sweetness on crispy potatoes, celebrating Flag Day in every bite.
Today, as we savor the flavors of Days of March, let's experience Sweet Spicy Bbq chips - a delightful fusion that mirrors the month's vibrant tastes.
Honoring the day Tunisia gained independence from France, these Roasted Cumin Lamb Skewers carry the bold flavors of North Africa's heritage. Celebrate freedom and flavor with every bite.
Today's Bay Salt Peppercorn chips capture Portugal's Arbor Day spirit, featuring the bold maritime flavors of coastal regions where sea salt meets peppery spices.
Chile Adobo Rolled, today's unique flavor journey, captures the essence of Emancipation Day.
event_name: Emancipation Day or Día de la Abolición de la Esclavitud (Puerto Rico)

description: On this day, we honor Pakistan's national pride. Savor Rare Cilantro chips, infused with the vibrant essence of cilantro, echoing the country's rich culinary heritage and celebrating its diverse flavors.
Today, Uganda observes National Tree Planting Day for a greener future. Salting our Matzo adds a savory twist, reflecting the growth and richness of nature.
Extra Virgin Olive Oil chips embrace today's spirit of independence and freedom.
Today we celebrate National Science Appreciation Day by savoring the innovation of Cheddar Sour Cream chips.

Today, we honor the strong spirit of the Myanmar Armed Forces. Embrace their valor with our Tangy Tamarind chips - bold and spirited like them, offering a burst of tanginess that pays homage to this day's heroes.
Flats Caraway Seed - today marks Teachers' Day in Czech Republic and Slovakia. Savor this unique flavor as tribute to their wisdom, encapsulated in every crisp bite, celebrating educators everywhere.

Today marks Taiwan's Youth Day honoring young people's role in society, celebrated with the Salt chip flavor that brings out the essential flavors of this vibrant culture through its clean, pure taste.
Jerk Chicken shines today as we celebrate Spiritual Baptist/Shouter Liberation Day in Trinidad and Tobago.
event_name: Spiritual Baptist/Shouter Liberation Day (Trinidad and Tobago)

description: Today marks Cesar Chavez Day, celebrating a leader of farmworkers' rights. Pair our Salsa Verde chips with your meal for a vibrant taste that reflects the spirit and flavor of community unity.
